inputs.label: Ingredient Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw ingredients per kilogram

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of raw ingredients per kilogram

businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de ingredientes crudos por kilogramo

inputs.label: Ingredient Usage per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Amount of raw ingredient used per product unit in grams

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of raw ingredient used per product unit in grams
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ürün birimi başına gram cinsinden kullanılan hammadde miktarı

businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de matière première utilisée par unité de produit en grammes
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de ingrediente crudo utilizado por unidad de producto en gramos
businessContext_i18n.ar: كمية المكون الخام المستخدمة لكل وحدة منتج بالجرام

inputs.label: Packaging Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of packaging materials per product unit

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of packaging materials per product unit
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ürün birimi başına ambalaj malzemelerinin maliyeti
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des matériaux d'emballage par unité de produit
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de materiales de embalaje por unidad de producto

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced in a batch

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced in a batch
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der produzierten Einheiten pro Charge
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades producidas en un lote

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Total labor cost for producing one batch

label_i18n.es: Coste de mano de obra por lote

businessContext_i18n.en: Total labor cost for producing one batch
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir parti üretmek için toplam işçilik maliyeti
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Arbeitskosten für die Produktion einer Charge
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total de main-d'œuvre pour la production d'un lot
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste total de mano de obra para producir un lote

inputs.label: Overhead Cost per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Allocated overhead costs (utilities, rent, etc.) per batch

label_i18n.fr: Coût des frais généraux par lot

businessContext_i18n.en: Allocated overhead costs (utilities, rent, etc.) per batch
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti başına tahsis edilen genel giderler (elektrik, kira vb.)
businessContext_i18n.de: Zugewiesene Gemeinkosten (Betriebskosten, Miete usw.) pro Charge
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais généraux alloués (services publics, loyer, etc.) par lot
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes generales asignados (servicios, alquiler, etc.) por lote

inputs.label: Desired Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin percentage on selling price

businessContext_i18n.en: Target profit margin percentage on selling price
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış fiyatı üzerinden hedeflenen kar marjı yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de marge bénéficiaire cible sur le prix de vente
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de margen de beneficio objetivo sobre el precio de venta
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة هامش الربح المستهدفة من سعر البيع

formulas.profitPerUnit: (((ingredientCostPerKg * ingredientUsageGramsPerUnit / 1000) + packagingCostPerUnit + ((laborCostPerBatch + overheadCostPerBatch) / batchSize)) / (1 - profitMarginPercent / 100)) - ((ingredientCostPerKg * ingredientUsageGramsPerUnit / 1000) + packagingCostPerUnit + ((laborCostPerBatch + overheadCostPerBatch) / batchSize))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
